title: Unified Trading System — Workspace Manifest v2
description: SSOT for all repos: types, dependencies, doc standards, merge order. Drives CI/CD, completeness checkers, service doc rollout, and quickmerge cascade.
notes: Updated 2026-03-24: Archive-only sweep — legacy split UIs, standalone APIs (incl. config/trading-analytics/ml-* -api), npm UI-kit/workspace repos, experimental services, and scratch/root data trees exist only under workspace-root archive/ (see archive/README.md). Manifest repositories = active surface only. | Prior: Archived odum-research-website, logs-dashboard-ui, live-health-monitor-ui, batch-audit-api; removed from manifest. | Prior: Active surface: unified-trading-system-ui + deployment-ui + unified-trading-api + auth-api + deployment-api + domain APIs (see ui-api-mapping). | Prior: 2026-03-13 ci_status sweep — promoted 4 BASELINE_RECORDED→VALIDATED; 15 FAILING. 2026-03-10 unified-admin-ui (npm monorepo) packa...

versions_policy.rule: All versions MUST be <1.0.0 until the repo passes a full quickmerge on main via the new CI/CD pipeline (Phase 0-CI complete). Version 1.0.0 is the first STABLE release — it is only set by the GitHub Action auto-bump on merge to main, never manually. No version in this manifest should be >=1.0.0 until that repo's tier is fully green.
versions_policy.bump_authority: GitHub Action (version-bump.yml) on merge to main only. Conventional commit prefix determines bump type.
versions_policy.local_bumps: FORBIDDEN on branches. Only the GitHub Action bumps versions. Manual bumps cause double-bump (local + CI = skipped semver).
versions_policy.pre_stable_convention: 0.MINOR.PATCH — minor reflects architectural evolution; patch reflects fixes. 0.x.x means not yet validated as stable on the new CI/CD pipeline.
versions_policy.stable_threshold: 1.0.0+ = passed full quickmerge on main with Phase 0-CI infrastructure in place.

versions._note: All versions reset to 0.x.x (2026-02-28). Nothing was stable under the old CI/CD — versions >=1.0.0 were aspirational. 1.0.0 will be set by GitHub Action on first successful main merge per repo. 0.x.y preserves relative evolution (e.g. UTL 0.2.2 reflects more history than AC 0.1.0).

batch-live-reconciliation-service.notes: Nightly T+1 orchestrator: replays ML→strategy→execution pipeline vs live events, attributes deviations per stage, writes recon reports to GCS.

client-reporting-api.notes: FastAPI + OAuth middleware. Client-facing reporting API. Aggregates PnL, positions, fills for external clients. Standalone client-reporting-ui archived under workspace-root archive/; reporting surfaces use unified-trading-system-ui.

deployment-api.description: Deployment API — standalone FastAPI service extracted from unified-trading-deployment-v3/api/. Monitors deployments, service status, cloud builds.
deployment-api.notes: Fully extracted from unified-trading-deployment-v3 on 2026-03-01. 27 route modules, gunicorn config, Google OAuth.

deployment-service.description: Deployment orchestration service — Python package (orchestrator, catalog, config_loader, backends, deployment/, CLI), Terraform, configs (SSOT). Layer 2: verify_infra.py (infra connectivity gate).
deployment-service.notes: Full extraction from unified-trading-deployment-v3 completed 2026-03-02. All Python modules, configs (81 YAML), terraform (193 files), tests (48 files), scripts, docs extracted. deployment-api/configs/ is a symlink to deployment-service/configs/.

execution-service.deployment_note: Per-client deployment — holds client order credentials. Category splits: CeFi/DeFi/TradFi.
execution-service.notes: Now includes sports execution functionality (merged from sports-execution-service 2026-03-01). Supports bet placement via USEI adapters.

features-commodity-service.notes: Config-driven commodity fundamental factor engine. FACTOR_REGISTRY + IC calibration + 4-state HMM regime detection + CommoditySignal composition and publishing. EIA/CFTC/BakerHughes/OpenMeteo/Yahoo data sources.

features-cross-instrument-service.notes: Cross-instrument feature aggregation service. Computes regime features (HMM volatility regimes, correlation regimes), cross-venue spreads, realized vs implied vol, cross-asset correlation. Aggregates outputs from features-delta-one-service, features-volatility-service, and market-data-processing-service.

features-multi-timeframe-service.notes: Multi-timeframe feature aggregation service (Layer 3b). Symmetric counterpart to features-cross-instrument-service. Computes cross-TF alignment, structure context, vol compression, and session context features by aggregating delta-one features at 5m/15m/1h/4h/1d per instrument.

features-sports-service.notes: Scaffolded 2026-02-28. Computes pre-match ML features (team form, H2H, referee, venue, weather, market odds). NOT required for CeFi/TradFi completion.

ibkr-gateway-infra.notes: Terraform + scripts for IBKR Gateway VM setup, SSH tunnel, startup. IaC for TradFi execution connectivity. 2026-03-05: Added scripts/ (quickmerge, setup, quality-gates), .github/workflows/ (quality-gates, version-bump), VERSION file, .pre-commit-config.yaml.

instruments-service.notes: Now includes sports reference data functionality (merged from sports-reference-data-service 2026-03-01).

market-data-processing-service.notes: Now includes sports odds processing functionality (merged from sports-odds-processing-service 2026-03-01). QG passing 2026-03-11.

matching-engine-library.notes: TIER 0: Pure order matching algorithms — zero inter-library deps. arch_tier corrected 2→0 on 2026-02-28. Any current UTL/UCI deps in source must be removed.

position-balance-monitor-service.deployment_note: Shared service — serves many clients. One instance per workspace.

strategy-service.deployment_note: One instance per client (separately managed accounts)
strategy-service.notes: Now includes sports strategy functionality (merged from sports-strategy-service 2026-03-01). Supports arbitrage + ML strategy modes for sports.

system-integration-tests.description: Layer 3a (fast smoke, @pytest.mark.smoke, <5 min) + Layer 3b (full e2e, @pytest.mark.full_e2e, 15-30 min). Sequential: 3a must pass before 3b. Triggered by deployment-api post-deploy. Requires GCP sandbox. Zero service imports — HTTP/GCS/PubSub only.
system-integration-tests.notes: Standalone repo. Not a library or service. SSOT: 06-coding-standards/integration-testing-layers.md

trading-agent-service.notes: Autonomous 7-loop micro-loop trading agent supervisor for TradFi commodity options/futures. Subscribes to CommoditySignal, ranks strategies via StrategySpec catalog in ConfigStore, routes through PreTradeCheckEngine to execution-service. Blockers: ibkr-config-in-ucc (L3 end-to-end), risk-circuit-breaker (PnLMonitor hook).

unified-cloud-interface.notes: Cloud abstraction layer: storage, pub/sub, logging. Tier 0 pure leaf.

unified-config-interface.ci_failure_reason: 11 import errors (UCI gcp_compute dependency chain, stale venv)

unified-domain-client.notes: TIER 3: Cloud storage I/O layer — reads/writes GCS/S3 domain data. Imports T0 (UCLI, UCI, UEI) + T1 (UTS). arch_tier corrected from 2→3 on 2026-02-28 per canonical DAG and codex SSOT (04-architecture/TIER-ARCHITECTURE.md).

unified-internal-contracts.notes: Internal message schemas, topic names, request/response/error contracts, domain/<service>/ output schemas. NO cloud SDKs. T0-L2b: may import UAC normalization canonicals; UAC must NOT import UIC. Build order: UAC (L2a, merge_level=2) must build before UIC (L2b, merge_level=3).

unified-position-interface.notes: Not yet built. Planned: per-client position feeds, normalises exchange-native format to canonical CanonicalPosition. Consumers: execution-service, position-balance-monitor-service.

unified-reference-data-interface.notes: REST-only reference data: instrument definitions, options chains, expiry calendars, corporate actions. Phase 8 of io_interface plan.

unified-sports-execution-interface.notes: Scaffolded 2026-02-28. BaseSportsAdapter protocol exists. Betfair (CLOB via UTEI) and Pinnacle adapters planned v1.0.0. NOT required for CeFi/TradFi completion.

unified-trading-codex.notes: Standards & codex repo. Coding standards, architecture docs, quality gate templates. Depends on PM for workspace-manifest.json, setup.sh template, cursor rules. CI infrastructure dep for ALL repos.

unified-trading-library.notes: Renamed from unified-trading-services to unified-trading-library (2026-03-02). Directory, package, and all imports now use unified-trading-library / unified_trading_library.

unified-trading-pm.description: Project management SSOT — workspace-manifest.json, setup.sh template, workspace-bootstrap.sh, cursor-rules/, AGENTS.md template, quickmerge.sh template
unified-trading-pm.notes: Pure root (L0). Contains workspace SSOT, CI/CD templates, cursor rules, AI plans. CI infrastructure dep for ALL repos — cloned alongside target repo in quality-gates.yml.

unified-features-interface.notes: Unified feature serving interface (UAC Citadel Architecture Phase 8)

unified-feature-orchestration-library.notes: Unified feature orchestration library (UAC Citadel Architecture Phase 8)

unified-sports-reference-interface.notes: Unified sports reference data interface (UAC Citadel Architecture Phase 8)

unified-trading-api.notes: Consolidated FastAPI gateway serving all domain data for the Unified Trading System UI.

unified-trading-system-ui.notes: Canonical Next.js trading UI. Legacy split UIs archived under workspace-root archive/.

topologicalOrder.description: Order for cascading quickmerge (dependencies BEFORE dependents). Drives CI/CD checkout order. L0-L1 are infrastructure deps (PM + codex) that ALL repos depend on for standards, templates, and manifest. CI clones these alongside the target repo.

levels.description: Project management — pure root (manifest, templates, scripts, cursor rules). No dependencies.
Standards & codex — coding standards, architecture docs, quality gate templates. Depends on PM.
Foundation — zero inter-library dependencies (Tier 0). Depends on PM + codex for CI standards.
Core interfaces (depends on UTEI, UTL, T0)
Foundational service (instruments only; no service-domain-data dependency)
Deployment infrastructure (deployment-api, deployment-service; deploys all services)
IaC + post-deploy validation (deploy last; references all service images)

0.description: Pure leaf — zero inter-library deps. Uses doc dependencies (PM, codex) for CI standards. Repos: unified-api-contracts, unified-internal-contracts, unified-cloud-interface, execution-algo-library, matching-engine-library

1.description: Services runtime (library) — imports Tier 0 only. Services use UTL for L2. Repos: unified-trading-library (UTL), unified-reference-data-interface, unified-config-interface (UCI)

2.description: Domain/market interfaces — imports Tier 0+1, NOT Tier 3. Repos: unified-market-interface, unified-trade-execution-interface, unified-ml-interface, unified-feature-calculator-library, unified-position-interface, unified-defi-execution-interface, unified-sports-execution-interface

3.description: Domain data client — cloud storage I/O, imports Tier 0+1. Repos: unified-domain-client (UDC)

service.description: Services — import from all library tiers. Never import from another service repo.

api.description: API gateway services (FastAPI+OAuth) — HTTP boundary between services and UIs. Deps: UTL+UCI+UEI only.

ui.description: TypeScript UIs — call API services via HTTP/SSE only. Never import Python libraries.

infrastructure.description: Infrastructure repos — codex, IaC (Terraform), scripts. No Python package deps. Repos: unified-trading-codex, ibkr-gateway-infra.

devops.description: DevOps/deployment — deployment-service, deployment-api. Imports UTL, UCI, UEI.

integration.description: Integration test harness — system-integration-tests. HTTP/GCS/PubSub only, no service imports.

futureRepos.description: Repos planned but not yet production-ready (v0.1.0 scaffolds exist in workspace)

repos.name: sports-reference-data-service
repos.notes: Archived 2026-03-01: merged into instruments-service. Original: Phase 3 Batch A.

repos.name: sports-odds-data-service
repos.notes: Archived 2026-03-01: merged into features-sports-service (API clients) and market-data-processing-service (odds processing). Original: Phase 3 Batch B.

repos.name: sports-odds-processing-service
repos.notes: Archived 2026-03-01: merged into market-data-processing-service. Original: Phase 3 Batch B.

repos.name: sports-strategy-service
repos.notes: Archived 2026-03-01: merged into strategy-service. Original: Phase 3 Batch D.

repos.name: sports-execution-service
repos.notes: Archived 2026-03-01: merged into execution-service. Original: Phase 3 Batch E.

removedEntries.corporate-actions: Not a standalone repo. It is an operational mode within instruments-service (reference data attributed to instruments).
removedEntries.unified-trading-deployment-v2: Superseded by unified-trading-deployment-v3. Exists on GitHub but ignored.

publishingOrder.description: Order for publishing packages to Artifact Registry

steps.reason: Tier 1 packages. UCI depends on UEI. UTL depends on T0 libs.
Can be published once all libraries are available

deployment_topology.description: L0 DAG — cloud provider, protocol defaults, messaging topology, colocation groups. Libraries own infra decisions; services declare mode + capabilities only.

local.note: CI, dev/test — no cloud SDKs required

messaging_topology.note: pubsub/sqs for async fan-out across service boundaries; redis for low-latency point-to-point; shared_memory for zero-copy within a colocated group

colocation_groups.note: Latency-critical path; must deploy together on same host; no network hop between them

infra_authority.note: Libraries (UCI T0, UTL T1, protocol router) own all infra decisions. Service source files must NEVER contain: gcs, s3, bigquery, pubsub, sqs, redis, bucket, dataset, topic, cloudtarget, upload_to_gcs, StandardizedDomainCloudService. Those belong only in UCI providers and deployment config.

completion_paths._description: Which repos are required for each vertical completion milestone. Unblocked = can be done now; blocked = needs another path's completion first.

cefi.label: CeFi / TradFi Commercialisation
cefi.description: Minimum set for commercial CeFi trading: crypto spot+perp (Binance, OKX, Bybit, Hyperliquid) + traditional equities (IBKR).
required_libraries: unified-api-contracts (CeFi venues: Binance, OKX, Bybit, Hyperliquid, Coinbase, IBKR, Deribit, Kalshi)
unified-position-interface (v1.0.0 needed before exec-services + PBM live)
not_required: Legacy split UIs, standalone APIs, npm UI-kit/workspace repos, experimental services, and scratch data trees — archived under workspace-root archive/ only (see archive/README.md). Not part of the active 1 UI + consolidated API surface.

defi.label: DeFi Extension
defi.description: Adds on-chain protocol support (Uniswap, Aave, Curve, Hyperliquid DEX). Requires CeFi path complete first.
additional_libraries: unified-api-contracts (DeFi: Uniswap v3/v4, Aave v3, Curve, TheGraph, DeFiLlama)

sports.label: Sports Betting Vertical
sports.description: Sports betting as a separate vertical. Does NOT require DeFi. Can be done in parallel with CeFi post-commercialisation.
additional_libraries: unified-api-contracts (sports: api_football, FootyStats, soccer-football-info, Betfair, Pinnacle, Open Meteo)
additional_services: instruments-service (sports reference data module, merged from sports-reference-data-service)
market-data-processing-service (sports odds processing module, merged from sports-odds-processing-service)
strategy-service (sports strategy module, merged from sports-strategy-service)
execution-service (sports execution module, merged from sports-execution-service)
sports.note: Sports services consolidated 2026-03-01: sports-reference-data-service merged into instruments-service, sports-odds-processing-service merged into market-data-processing-service, sports-strategy-service merged into strategy-service, sports-execution-service merged into execution-service. features-sports-service and unified-sports-execution-interface remain standalone. Can develop sports ML pipeline in parallel with CeFi. Only needs USEI v1.0.0 for live execution.

staging_commits._note: Exact commit SHAs under test in the current SIT run. Written by update-repo-version.yml when branch=staging. Locked by sit-gate.yml at SIT start. Cleared by staging-to-main.yml after promotion.

main_commits._note: Rolling history of last 5 staging sets promoted to main. Used for rollback reference.

deployed_versions._note: Current deployed image tag per repo per environment. Updated by Cloud Build post-deploy.
